footerBlurb: Photographer & filmmaker capturing studio, sport, music, brands and events. GA RA Art Productions.

lede: Let’s create memories and bring your visions to life — studio portraits, sports, music, brands and the events that matter, shot with intention and edited with soul.

heroImage.alt: Editorial portrait session — subject in a beanie and zip-up photographed against soft panelled light

services.title: Photography
services.blurb: Editorial portraits, match-day intensity and event coverage — composed, graded and delivered ready to publish.

services.title: Videography
services.blurb: Films that move — sports reels, event recaps, interviews and music visuals cut to rhythm and story.

services.title: Brand & Commercial
services.blurb: Campaign imagery for clothing, products and ads — content engineered for feeds, screens and billboards.

quote: Every frame is a memory someone gets to keep. My job is to make it worth keeping — whatever the brief, wherever the light.

portrait.alt: From the studio collection — seated portrait on a green chesterfield

paragraphs: Godwin Antiedu — known to most as GA — is the photographer and filmmaker behind World of GA and GA RA Art Productions.

The work moves between worlds: tailored studio sessions, finish-line sports coverage, music visuals, clothing campaigns and the corporate events where brands meet people. What ties it together is the same promise — let’s create memories and bring your visions to life.
Every booking starts with a conversation about what you want the images to do. Then it’s planned, shot and delivered — graded, edited and ready to publish.

steps.title: Brief
steps.text: Tell GA the vision — what you’re making, where it’ll live, and the feeling it should carry.

steps.title: Plan
steps.text: Dates, locations, looks and a shot list — agreed up front so the day runs itself.

steps.title: Shoot
steps.text: Photo, film or both — directed calmly and shot with intention.

steps.title: Deliver
steps.text: Graded, edited and delivered online — ready for feeds, screens and print.

quote: Bring a vision — leave with a memory that outlasts the moment.

lede: Tell GA about the shoot — date, place, vision. You’ll hear back quickly.
responseNote: Enquiries are answered within 1–2 working days. For urgent dates, say so in the message and it’ll be prioritised.

faqs.a: Studio portraits, sports and fitness, music content, clothing and brand campaigns, ads, and corporate events — in photo, film or both.
Send a date and a short brief through the form or by email. You’ll get availability, a plan and a quote — then the date is locked in.
Yes — tell us where the shoot is in the brief and travel is built into the plan.
As an edited online gallery for photos, and graded, export-ready films for video — sized for wherever they’ll live.

title: Studio Photography

cover.alt: Studio portrait of a man in a navy suit against cream panelled walls

description: An editorial suit session against warm panelled walls — tailored navy, a green chesterfield, and light shaped to flatter. Four frames, graded with soul.

photos.caption: Seated on the green chesterfield

photos.alt: Studio portrait of a man in a navy suit posed against cream panelled walls
photos.caption: Against the panelled wall

title: Sports Photography

cover.alt: Two athletes embrace at the finish line of a race

description: Finish lines, battle ropes and the crowd that carries both — the community of competition and fitness, photographed where the effort actually happens.

photos.caption: Under the gantry

photos.caption: Eyes on the line

photos.alt: Runner in a white tee punches the air as he crosses the finish line among other finishers

photos.alt: Two climbers share a laugh in front of a bouldering wall studded with holds

title: Everything Music

cover.alt: Two figures in embroidered varsity jackets watch the sea at golden hour

description: Music lives in motion as much as in stills — golden-hour artist content shot for the feed, with reels and visuals landing on Instagram and YouTube as the collection grows.

photos.alt: Two artists in embroidered varsity jackets photographed from behind at golden hour, looking out over the water
photos.caption: Golden hour, varsity jackets

noteCard.text: More music visuals land on Instagram and YouTube as the collection grows.

title: Sports Videography

cover.alt: Athlete mid battle-rope set at a competitive fitness event

description: Stills freeze the moment — film lets it breathe. Race days, fitness events and competition cut to rhythm: the build-up, the effort, the release.
videoNote: The sports films live where they move best — on YouTube. Reels and longer cuts from the same events also have a stills side, shot frame by frame.

noteCard.text: Reels and match films live on YouTube. The stills from the same days have a collection of their own.

title: Corporate Events — Photos

cover.alt: Portrait in a broadcast studio in front of a stadium screen

description: From the branded studio set to the press wall — portraits, interviews and arrivals shot with editorial polish, so the night is remembered the way it felt.

photos.alt: Portrait of a guest in a retro football shirt, arms crossed, in front of a wraparound stadium screen in a branded broadcast studio
photos.caption: Inside the broadcast studio

photos.alt: Presenter with a microphone interviewing a guest against a branded press wall at an event launch
photos.caption: Media-wall interview

photos.alt: Guest answering questions beside the red carpet rope line, microphones reaching into frame
photos.caption: On the press line

photos.alt: Two guests sharing a microphone on the red carpet in front of the press wall while a phone films them
photos.caption: Red-carpet arrivals

photos.alt: Wide portrait on set in a branded studio, the stadium screen glowing behind blue velvet sofas
photos.caption: On set, branded studio

title: Branding, Clothing & More

cover.alt: Embroidered varsity jackets photographed from behind at golden hour

description: Campaign imagery for clothing and brands — pieces photographed on people, in real light, so the work looks the way it’s meant to be worn.

photos.alt: Two figures in embroidered varsity jackets photographed from behind at golden hour, facing the sea
photos.caption: Varsity jacket campaign at golden hour

noteCard.text: Campaign archives live on Instagram — and new briefs are always welcome.

title: Ads & Commercials

cover.alt: Frame from a live social commercial shoot in the city

description: Commercial content built for feeds and screens — ads and social-first films shot with intention, cut to rhythm and graded to stop the scroll.
videoNote: Got a product, a launch or a story that needs to sell itself? Send the brief — GA shoots, cuts and grades commercial content ready to publish.

noteCard.text: Commercial work is built around the brief — tell us what the ad needs to do.

title: Corporate Event Videos

cover.alt: Cinematic interview frame — subject on a chesterfield sofa in warm low light

description: Recap films and on-camera interviews that hold on to the feeling of the room — cut to rhythm, graded warm, and ready to share the morning after.
videoNote: Event films live in motion — the recaps and interview cuts are on YouTube. Stills from the same coverage sit in the corporate event photo collection.

noteCard.text: Event films and interviews live on YouTube. The photo coverage from the same rooms is here too.
